title: Inky Pinky Inky Ponky Lyrics Vaalu Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: You are My Darling
Singer: Simbu
Movie: Vaalu
Music: Thaman S

Pink pinky pinky ponky
inga pottu paarthaen ponnu
father aaga donky enga
inga thaedi parthaen kannu

Inky Pinky Inky Ponky
inga vittu pogaadha

Hey nayanthara vena
andrea vum venaam
thamanaavum venaam
andha samanthaavum venaam
deepikaavum venaam
kattrina vum venaam

Ye penne unai paarthaa podhum
yaarum venaamey

you are my darling
you are my darling
you are my darling darling baby

Frequently Asked Questions

What is the release year of the song Inky Pinky Inky Ponky?

The song was released in 2014.

The song is sung by Simbu.

Who composed the music for Vaalu?

What is the theme of the song?

The song is a peppy and energetic dance number that adds a fun vibe to the movie.

enrichedMetadata.summary: Inky Pinky Inky Ponky from Vaalu is a vibrant and energetic song that captures the playful essence of the film. Sung by Simbu, the track is a lively dance number that adds a fun and celebratory mood to the movie. The catchy beats by Thaman S make it an ideal choice for parties and celebrations. The song's playful lyrics and upbeat tempo convey a sense of joy and excitement, making it a memorable part of the film's soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Get ready to groove with Inky Pinky Inky Ponky from the movie Vaalu. This energetic track features Simbu's vibrant vocals paired with Thaman S's catchy beats, creating a perfect party anthem. Dive into the lively spirit of this song and let the rhythm take over!
stanzaMeanings: You are My Darling Singer: Simbu Movie: Vaalu Music: Thaman S
Pink pinky pinky ponky, I looked here and saw, the girl's father is a donkey, I searched here and saw, dear.
Inky Pinky Inky Ponky, don't leave from here.
Hey, I don't want Nayanthara, I don't want Andrea, I don't want Tamanna, I don't want Samantha, I don't want Deepika, I don't want Katrina.
Hey girl, just looking at you is enough, I don't need anyone else.
you are my darling you are my darling you are my darling darling baby
